providers.role_hint: Use for symbolic understanding, embeddings, similarity, reranking, and evaluation.
providers.installation_hint: Install optional dependencies (e.g. torch + transformers) and set MUSICBERT_MODEL_PATH.

providers.role_hint: Use for MIDI continuation/infill and conditional symbolic generation.
providers.installation_hint: Install Moonbeam runtime and set MOONBEAM_MODEL_PATH.

providers.role_hint: Use for controllable multitrack symbolic composition and infill.
providers.installation_hint: Install MIDI-GPT runtime and set MIDIGPT_MODEL_PATH.

providers.role_hint: Use for text prompt to symbolic sketch generation.
providers.installation_hint: Install Text2MIDI runtime and set TEXT2MIDI_MODEL_PATH.

availability.role_hint: Use for symbolic understanding, embeddings, similarity, reranking, and evaluation.
availability.installation_hint: Install optional dependencies (e.g. torch + transformers) and set MUSICBERT_MODEL_PATH.
limitations: MusicBERT model weights are not bundled with this repository.
This adapter intentionally avoids heavyweight runtime imports at module load time.
Generation is disabled because MusicBERT is treated as an evaluator/understanding witness.

availability.role_hint: Use for MIDI continuation/infill and conditional symbolic generation.
availability.installation_hint: Install Moonbeam runtime and set MOONBEAM_MODEL_PATH.
limitations: Moonbeam weights/runtime are optional and not included in this repository.
Adapter currently performs capability/availability reporting only.
No model inference is executed when backend is unavailable.

availability.role_hint: Use for controllable multitrack symbolic composition and infill.
availability.installation_hint: Install MIDI-GPT runtime and set MIDIGPT_MODEL_PATH.
limitations: MIDI-GPT weights/runtime are optional and not included in this repository.
Adapter currently performs capability/availability reporting only.
No model inference is executed when backend is unavailable.

availability.role_hint: Use for text prompt to symbolic sketch generation.
availability.installation_hint: Install Text2MIDI runtime and set TEXT2MIDI_MODEL_PATH.
limitations: Text2MIDI weights/runtime are optional and not included in this repository.
Adapter currently performs capability/availability reporting only.
No model inference is executed when backend is unavailable.
